Package com.apexfintechsolutions.ascendsdk.models.components

Class RebookTradeAllocationResponse

java.lang.Object
com.apexfintechsolutions.ascendsdk.models.components.RebookTradeAllocationResponse
public class RebookTradeAllocationResponse extends Object
RebookTradeAllocationResponse - Rebooking a trade allocation will always return a new resource that contains the rebooked trade allocation.
